name: TPCS Public Company Limited
summary: TPCS Public Company Limited, together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and sells non-woven fabric products in Thailand and internationally. It offers non-woven fabrics for headlining interiors, truck liners, and seat back interiors; air cabin filters; sun shades made from polyester fabrics; pocket nets for seat backs; handle adjust reclining release for car seats; and rigid tapes. The company also provides health care products, including face mask, back support products, wrist and ankle support products, and caps and gowns; filters for air conditioners; high tenacity belts for the boat sail industry; seat and net bags for aircraft interiors; fiber non-woven, and glue and lining fabrics; sponge shoulders pads and shapes, breasts, and fabric laminates; sport shirts; and blankets, pillow products, cloth napkins, bolsters, cushions, baby bedding sets, and cloth diapers. In addition, it is involved in the hire of works. The company serves automotive, industrial, healthcare, and home textile industries. The company was formerly known as Textile Prestige Public Company Limited and changed its name to TPCS Public Company Limited in April 2021. TPCS Public Company Limited was founded in 1976 and is headquartered in Bangkok, Thailand.
